content.text: Yeah, no, I know, I just -- Thursday is this big presentation to the senior team, it's my first one in this new role, and my boss added a stakeholder review on top of it which means I have to prep two different sets of materials and I haven't even started the second one and it's -- yeah. And then there's the school pickup thing, my partner can usually do it but they have a thing this week, so I have to figure out who covers that, and my mom's birthday is -- anyway. Thursday. That's the main thing. What would you do? Like, what's the most important thing to prep first?
